Our Community

Life at FBC Shannon

From Sunday worship to youth camp to fall festivals — we do life together.

Worship From Anywhere

Watch Live

We go live every Sunday at 10:00 AM. Watch right here — and when no service is live, visit our YouTube or Facebook page for past sermons.

Live Sundays · 10 AM

Worship With Us Online

Can't make it in person? We go live every Sunday at 10:00 AM. Tune in right here and worship with your FBC family from wherever you are.

When no service is live, all past services are available on our YouTube channel and Facebook page.

▶️ Past Services on YouTube 📘 Past Services on Facebook 📍 Visit Us in Person 💛 Give Online
What's Coming Up

Upcoming Events

Stay connected with what's happening at FBC Shannon.

Every Sun
☀️
9 AM · 10 AM
5 PM · 6 PM

Sunday Services

Sunday School at 9 AM, Morning Worship at 10 AM, Bible Study at 5 PM, and Evening Worship at 6 PM. Nursery provided at all services.

6:00 PM Service

Service and classes start at 6:00 PM.

Service and classes start at 6:00 PM.

🥪
11:30 AM

Noon Crew · Brown Bag Lunch

Every Wednesday at 11:30 AM. Designed for retirees and senior adults to get together

June 8 - 11
🏖️
6:00 PM Service

Vacation Bible School

VBS for all ages. Every night June 8-11 from 5:30-8:00 PM

April 4
🪺
9:00 AM

Community Easter Egg Hunt

We will be doing face painting, handing out card, and serving popcorn. Volunteers are needed to set up no later than 9:00AM

Generosity

Give to
God's Work

Your generosity supports our church family, our community, and missions work near and far. Every gift matters.

"Each of you should give what you have decided in your heart to give, not reluctantly or under compulsion, for God loves a cheerful giver."

2 Corinthians 9:7
💛

Online Giving

Give securely online — one-time or recurring. Every gift goes directly to the work of FBC Shannon.

Get Involved

Our Ministries

There's a place for everyone at FBC Shannon — from the nursery to the choir loft.

👶
Nursery
Safe, loving nursery care provided at every service so parents can worship with peace of mind.
🧒
Children's Ministry
Fun, Bible-based classes and activities for kids of all ages, Sunday mornings and Wednesday nights.
🔥
Youth Group
An active, Christ-centered youth group with weekly meetings, events, and summer camp (FUGE!).
📖
Bible Study
Sunday School classes at 9 AM and Sunday evening at 5 PM, with classes for every age group.
📕
Wednesday Night
Service and classes at 6:00 PM for all ages.
